description: Tiny, bright-eyed tinkerers and illusionists brimming with curiosity and infectious enthusiasm.
subraces: Shy woodland dwellers speaking with small animals and weaving minor illusions for fun.
Inventive gadgeteers filling their workshops with clockwork toys and alchemical experiments.
Stone-gray underdark survivors mining gems in silence, trusting no outsider.
Dragonmarked scholars magically inscribing, translating, and sending messages across vast distances.
Obsessive engineers building elaborate contraptions that often explode before they work.
Shadow-quiet infiltrators moving in utter silence and gathering secrets for a living.
Wild magic conduits whose very presence warps probability and invites the unexpected.
